source_intake_record.raw_question_text: In the circuit shown in figure, when the applied voltage is \( u = 220\sqrt{2}\sin(\omega t) \) V, the reactance of capacitor \( C_1 \) is \( X_{C1} = 110\Omega \), and the reactance of capacitor \( C_2 \) is \( X_{C2} = 220\Omega \). The readings of the three ammeters \( A, A_1, \) and \( A_2 \) are \( I, I_1, \) and \( I_2 \), respectively. The values of \( I_1 \) and \( I_2 \) are ( )
source_intake_record.raw_answer_text: \( I_1 = 3 \text{ A}, I_2 = 2 \text{ A}, I = 1 \text{ A} \)
